creator: glewis@eyesbeyond.com
text:
The jdk13 should be updated to cope with the release of patchset 4.  I've
marked the priority as medium since the older patchset the port is based
on is no longer available (the Sun licensing restrictions make allowing
access to older patches more trouble than its worth for me to do).

Note that aside from the attached patch, the patch which is contained in
files/patch-..::src::solaris::classes::sun::awt::motif::font.properties.bsd
is no longer relevant and the file should be removed.

Fix: Apply the following patch to the port.  You should also consider fixing the
Open Motif port as per http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=30421 to
fix a (longstanding) problem for Chinese, Japanese and Korean users.
